sections.paragraph:
masculine noun טרוף (>>טירוף)

madness, insanity, insaneness, lunacy, looniness, mania, amok, amuck, frenzy, phrensy, rabidity, furor, fury, cacodemonia, cacodaemonia; confusion, craziness, delirium

adjective

torn to pieces (by an animal) , ravaged

adjective

mixed, scrambled

adjective

sunk
